productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Black Sandals
description: Add subtle bling to your outfit effortlessly with this pair of black sandals from carlton london. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot with a buckle embellishment Synthetic leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Raised heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
